subcodes.first_line: Smrt nudi svakom odanom vjerniku pehar koji je uistinu život… Ona daje dar života vječnoga.
subcodes.notes: NOT a prayer. Croatian extract/quotation about death: "Smrt nudi svakom odanom vjerniku pehar koji je uistinu zivot... Ona daje dar zivota vjecnoga." = "Death offers every devoted believer a cup which is truly life... It gives the gift of eternal life." AB or BH quotation about the nature of death. Compilation text.
